prompt_text:
### Demographics: 72-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 17 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.9 kg; Height 169.1 cm; BMI 22.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 9.9%; current 9.3%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 237mg/dL; 6 months ago 241mg/dL; 3 months ago 276mg/dL; current 198mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.7kg; 9 months ago 59.1kg; 6 months ago 61.2kg; 3 months ago 60.8kg; current 62.9kg), Height (12 months ago 169.1cm; 9 months ago 169.1cm; 6 months ago 169.1cm; 3 months ago 169.1cm; current 169.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 22.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 69U/L; 9 months ago 68U/L; 6 months ago 69U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 76U/L), AST (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 48U/L; 3 months ago 56U/L; current 54U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 433mg/g; 9 months ago 623mg/g; 6 months ago 517mg/g; 3 months ago 531mg/g; current 684mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 61mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.83 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
